allow: Bash(grep -n 'onToken' dist/assets/*.js 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo 'no dist assets')
Bash(npm install -D vite@^7 @tailwindcss/vite@^4 tailwindcss@^4 && npm uninstall autoprefixer postcss 2>&1 | tail -10)
Bash(git commit -m "feat: smart page context - lightweight injection + extract_page_elements tool")
Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "fix: click_element dispatches full mouse event sequence for realistic click simulation")
Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "fix: remove partial streaming message from UI when user interrupts AI response")
Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "feat: show yes/no quick-reply buttons for ask_user questions")
Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "feat: ask_user tool carries is_yes_no flag, AI decides when to show yes/no buttons")
Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "fix: yes/no buttons compact, right-aligned next to bubble, with pop-in animation")
